title: Evangelion 101 R1 DVD Details
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 1.01 R1 DVD Details [NO SPOILERS]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:26 pm The AFI Dallas screening was the first time Funimation's version of 1.01 was shown. Here are some fun notes that others may find intriguing. -First off, no wobble or film grain . A direct digital transfer. Awesome. In that sense, what we're getting is better than what them Japs got. Sorry, GendosPapa. -It could just be that the theater was all dark and such, but I didn't see any darkness or detail loss issues. This could also be due to the fact that this is a digital transfer and not recorded from film. -Subtitle translations are nice for the most part. They refer to Lilith's apparent pact with humans as a covenant rather than a contract. That has a more biblical feel to it, right? =3 =3 =3 They also have Kaworu just say "I look forward to seeing you, Shinji Ikari", leaving out the whole "again" thing. That was a bit disappointing. -This is indeed 1.01 and not 1.11. No new scenes. EDIT: Oh yes, and the Funimation representative there said the DVD will indeed come out in November.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:30 pm Was there a discussion or panel after all? Were there any announcements about 1.11? Glad to know it was done well.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:31 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Was there a discussion or panel after all?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:35 pm Well if my Region 01 version of the film looks different than my Region 02 version than no worries. Variety is a nice spice in life. I'm guessing no mention was made of a release date so we still might be looking at November 10. P.S. I figure unless Anno and co. do a third tune up (A 1.111 or 1.21) we won't see 1.11 until a Four Film Complete Boxset is released years down the line.

[]: Funimation release details             Quote Post by metroten » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:39 pm Hi again all! Long-time reader, one-time poster (German steelbook DVD) . . . I just got back from the Dallas screening and yeah, Funi says November for a US R1 DVD. I asked the rep what version they will have (1.0, 1.01, or 1.11). She confirmed that they have 1.0 and 1.01 but not 1.11. They aren't sure how they will release them, but they won't be together on one disc or anything. They may just put out 1.01. She suggested they may stagger them out - do 1.0 on DVD then 1.01 on DVD and Blu-Ray - it depended on retailer response. Hopefully they don't string us along and make us wait for 1.01. Still unfortunate in any case about 1.11.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:49 pm I thought 1.01 was the only version released on DVD anyway and 1.0 was what Japanese theaters showed?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:52 pm It would strike me as kind've pointless to release a 1.0 on DVD first. I mean 1.01 doesn't really add anything drastic to the film except for fixing goofs ("EmArgency" on elevators instead of "Emergency") and other small bits like that. But then again I've seen worse cases of money milking.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:58 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I thought 1.01 was the only version released on DVD anyway and 1.0 was what Japanese theaters showed?

[]: 1.0 just film?             Quote Post by metroten » Thu Apr 02, 2009 11:01 pm The print they showed in the theater may have been the older 1.0 but I didn't notice any difference. Anyone? Yeah, 1.0 was only released as a film so maybe she was confused or just referring to the film print they procurred for the festival. Unless of course they bought that version as well for the purpose of transferring it into another DVD release. Heck, even Khara didn't try to sell 1.0. EDIT: I did notice that it appeared brighter than the DVD but it still could have been the 1.01 film print. That was re-released in Japanese theaters, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Apr 02, 2009 11:02 pm Well if the Region 01 DVD is going to 1.0 (until it's confirmed I'm not gonna think it over) then yeah, there's gonna be some differences between my two Region versions of the film.

[]: 1.11             Quote Post by metroten » Thu Apr 02, 2009 11:11 pm It's too bad the JP 1.11 probably won't have English subs - then I'd be set. And if the US is only 1.0 or even 1.01 it will still be (slightly) deficient. I'm still debating buying the 1.11. Considering I'll end up with three copies of 1.01 already, I may just wait for the eventual final-versions boxset in 2018.

[]: Re: Details on the Funimation DVD             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 03, 2009 7:23 am NAveryW wrote: They also have Kaworu just say "I look forward to seeing you, Shinji Ikari", leaving out the whole "again" thing. That was a bit disappointing.

[]: Re: Details on the Funimation DVD             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Fri Apr 03, 2009 8:30 am The Eva Monkey wrote: NAveryW wrote: They also have Kaworu just say "I look forward to seeing you, Shinji Ikari", leaving out the whole "again" thing. That was a bit disappointing.

[]: Re: Details on the Funimation DVD             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Apr 03, 2009 11:21 am Master Raven wrote: You dislike FUNimation's VAs, NAW?

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sat Apr 04, 2009 2:58 am The Invincible Shinji wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: Hey guys: Back on topic.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Apr 04, 2009 3:02 am Well, I split out about 90 percent of the old thread. No problems being on topic now. The Blu-Ray would probably not be worth it unless it had good enough extras (No idea what else'll be included on the disk).

[]:             Quote Post by The Invincible Shinji » Sat Apr 04, 2009 3:12 am UrsusArctos wrote: I split out about 90 percent of the old thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 04, 2009 4:28 am The Invincible Shinji wrote: But i thought that was part of discussing the DVD in the first place, isn't the dub importent as well?

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sat Apr 04, 2009 10:19 am Reichu wrote: The Invincible Shinji wrote: But i thought that was part of discussing the DVD in the first place, isn't the dub importent as well?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Apr 04, 2009 1:41 pm I just remembered something about Funimation's subs: the dialogue often seemed less corny than in the fansub I had seen before. I don't remember any particular examples other than "No particular reason. It's just your fate" was translated by Funimation as "No particular reason. The fate happens to be yours, that's all." Forgive me if my memory isn't exactly correct on that line. Also, the translation may not always be literal. They translated "energy system" as "power system", even though "enerugi" was clearly audible. Plus the line "A snake will gather his friends..." was changed to "Set one fox after another..." Interestingly, they left "Bathing is the laundry of life!" completely unchanged, despite the fact that it makes practically no sense in English.
